title: Public Transport Week
description: Use only public transportation for an entire week. No private car trips!

title: No Car Day
description: Go completely car-free for one day. Walk, bike, or use public transit instead.

title: Save Electricity
description: Reduce your daily electricity consumption by 20%. Turn off unused lights and appliances.

title: Green Shopping Challenge
description: Avoid online shopping for a full week. Buy locally and only what you truly need.

title: Plant-Based Week
description: Eat only plant-based meals for one week. No meat or dairy products.

title: Bike Commute Challenge
description: Commute by bicycle for at least 3 days this week instead of using a motor vehicle.

title: Solar Switch Challenge
description: Use solar-powered chargers for all your devices for one week. No grid charging allowed!

title: Zero Waste Week
description: Produce zero landfill waste for an entire week. Compost, recycle, and refuse single-use items.

title: Local Food Challenge
description: Eat only locally-sourced food for one week. Nothing that traveled more than 100 km!

title: Cold Water Wash
description: Wash all your clothes in cold water for 2 weeks. Hot water washing uses 10x more energy.

title: Carpool Week
description: Share rides with colleagues or friends for at least 5 days. Each shared ride cuts emissions by 50%.

title: Meat-Free Month
description: Go completely meat-free for 30 days. Plant-based diets have half the carbon footprint.

title: Paperless Office
description: Go completely paperless for one week. No printing — use digital notes and documents only.

title: Tree Planting Drive
description: Plant at least 5 trees this month. Each tree absorbs ~21 kg CO₂ per year.

title: AC-Free Week
description: Survive one week without air conditioning. Use fans and natural ventilation instead.
